**OpenAI Agents SDK** is OpenAI's official agent runtime. v0.1 stable. MIT licensed. Production deployments at OpenAI itself and in customer pilots. Distinct from Assistants API by separating planner, tool use, and memory as composable layers.

- [official] https://openai.github.io/openai-agents-python/
- [field report] migration guide from Assistants API.
